news.title:
JB Chemicals declares an interim dividend of ₹12.7 per share.
Shareholders benefit from a direct return on their investment.
news.summary:
JB Chemicals declares an interim dividend of ₹12.7 per share.
Shareholders benefit from a direct return on their investment.

news.title: Narayan Saraf resigns as CFO of JB Chemicals.
news.summary: Narayan Saraf resigns as CFO of JB Chemicals.

news.title:
Torrent Pharma merges with JB Chemicals, creating India's 5th largest pharma firm by market share and 2nd by market cap.
The merger enhances Torrent's chronic therapy portfolio, CDMO capabilities, and global footprint with synergies in products and operations.
news.summary:
Torrent Pharma merges with JB Chemicals, creating India's 5th largest pharma firm by market share and 2nd by market cap.
The merger enhances Torrent's chronic therapy portfolio, CDMO capabilities, and global footprint with synergies in products and operations.

news.title:
JB Chemicals' CFO Narayan Saraf resigns, effective Jan 30, 2026, citing personal reasons.
Company confirms no material reason for resignation beyond pursuing other opportunities.
news.summary:
JB Chemicals' CFO Narayan Saraf resigns, effective Jan 30, 2026, citing personal reasons.
Company confirms no material reason for resignation beyond pursuing other opportunities.

news.title:
Torrent Pharma's Dahej facility cleared by FDA; it raises JB Chemicals stake to 48.75%.
Q2FY26 profit rises 30.4% YoY to ₹591 crore; India biz grows 12% with strong chronic portfolio.
news.summary:
Torrent Pharma's Dahej facility cleared by FDA; it raises JB Chemicals stake to 48.75%.
Q2FY26 profit rises 30.4% YoY to ₹591 crore; India biz grows 12% with strong chronic portfolio.

news.title:
JB Chemicals projects FY26 operating margins between 27-29% and Q4 gross margins at 60-69%.
Full-year EBITDA margins are estimated to be near 28-29%.
news.summary:
JB Chemicals projects FY26 operating margins between 27-29% and Q4 gross margins at 60-69%.
Full-year EBITDA margins are estimated to be near 28-29%.

news.title:
JB Chemicals' management expects the merger with Torrent Pharma to conclude in Q4.
The update was shared during the company's recent conference call.
news.summary:
JB Chemicals' management expects the merger with Torrent Pharma to conclude in Q4.
The update was shared during the company's recent conference call.

news.title:
JB Chemicals' CFO reports sustained sales momentum despite a higher base last year.
The company expects this positive trend to continue into Q4 per concall updates.
news.summary:
JB Chemicals' CFO reports sustained sales momentum despite a higher base last year.
The company expects this positive trend to continue into Q4 per concall updates.

news.title: J. B. Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals held its Q3 FY26 earnings call on Jan 19, 2026.
news.summary: J. B. Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals held its Q3 FY26 earnings call on Jan 19, 2026.

news.title:
JB Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Ltd reported Q3 FY26 revenue of ₹1065 crore, a YoY growth of 11%. Operating EBITDA grew 13% YoY to ₹305 crore with margins improving to 28.7%.
Domestic formulations revenue rose 10% YoY to ₹620 crore, while international business grew 12% to ₹445 crore. Razel franchise and Sporlac showed strong growth.
news.summary:
JB Chemicals & Pharmaceuticals Ltd reported Q3 FY26 revenue of ₹1065 crore, a YoY growth of 11%. Operating EBITDA grew 13% YoY to ₹305 crore with margins improving to 28.7%.
Domestic formulations revenue rose 10% YoY to ₹620 crore, while international business grew 12% to ₹445 crore. Razel franchise and Sporlac showed strong growth.

news.title:
Torrent Pharma plans a $1.4 billion bond sale for acquisition funding in January.
The issuance will span maturities of 1 to 5 years, per bankers.
news.summary:
Torrent Pharma plans a $1.4 billion bond sale for acquisition funding in January.
The issuance will span maturities of 1 to 5 years, per bankers.

news.title:
JB Chemicals received an order from the Joint Commissioner of State Tax, Uttar Pradesh.
Order demands Rs. 4.01 cr due to FY22 ITC disallowance; no material financial impact expected.
news.summary:
JB Chemicals received an order from the Joint Commissioner of State Tax, Uttar Pradesh.
Order demands Rs. 4.01 cr due to FY22 ITC disallowance; no material financial impact expected.

news.title:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals launched an open offer to acquire 26% of JB Chemicals' expanded share capital at INR 1,639.18/share.
The total offer aggregates to INR 6,842.8 crore, assuming full acceptance, and was published across leading newspapers.
news.summary:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals launched an open offer to acquire 26% of JB Chemicals' expanded share capital at INR 1,639.18/share.
The total offer aggregates to INR 6,842.8 crore, assuming full acceptance, and was published across leading newspapers.

news.title:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals launches open offer for JB Chemicals at INR 1639.18/share.
Offer targets 26% expanded share capital, worth INR 6842.8 crore.
news.summary:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals launches open offer for JB Chemicals at INR 1639.18/share.
Offer targets 26% expanded share capital, worth INR 6842.8 crore.

news.title:
JB Chemicals & Pharma Q2 net profit rises 19% YoY to ₹2.08B, revenue grows 8.5% YoY to ₹10.85B.
EBITDA improves 14.8% YoY to ₹3.1B, boosting EBITDA margin to 28.54% from 27.04% YoY.
news.summary:
JB Chemicals & Pharma Q2 net profit rises 19% YoY to ₹2.08B, revenue grows 8.5% YoY to ₹10.85B.
EBITDA improves 14.8% YoY to ₹3.1B, boosting EBITDA margin to 28.54% from 27.04% YoY.

news.title:
J B Chemicals gains 6.6%, reaching Rs. 1813.4, with strong short-term performance.
YTD, it trails Sensex; investor participation has decreased.
news.summary:
J B Chemicals gains 6.6%, reaching Rs. 1813.4, with strong short-term performance.
YTD, it trails Sensex; investor participation has decreased.

news.title:
Bikaji Foods saw a 28.2x volume surge to 1.04L shares, dropping 1.16% to Rs.709.25.
HBL Engg, JB Chemicals, Interglobe Aviation, National Aluminium also saw notable volume spikes.
news.summary:
Bikaji Foods saw a 28.2x volume surge to 1.04L shares, dropping 1.16% to Rs.709.25.
HBL Engg, JB Chemicals, Interglobe Aviation, National Aluminium also saw notable volume spikes.

news.title:
JB Pharma schedules Q2 FY26 earnings call on Nov 12, 2025 at 2 PM IST.
Senior management will discuss results for quarter ending Sep 30, 2025; registration details provided.
news.summary:
JB Pharma schedules Q2 FY26 earnings call on Nov 12, 2025 at 2 PM IST.
Senior management will discuss results for quarter ending Sep 30, 2025; registration details provided.

news.title:
Pharma, healthcare deals totaled $3.5B in Q3 2023, per Grant Thornton.
Included 3 IPOs worth $428M and 1 QIP worth $88M in the sector.
news.summary:
Pharma, healthcare deals totaled $3.5B in Q3 2023, per Grant Thornton.
Included 3 IPOs worth $428M and 1 QIP worth $88M in the sector.

news.title:
Torrent Pharma plans India's biggest FY26 bond issue post CCI approval for JB Chemicals acquisition.
The fund-raising move aligns with Torrent's acquisition strategy, reported by Reuters citing bankers.
news.summary:
Torrent Pharma plans India's biggest FY26 bond issue post CCI approval for JB Chemicals acquisition.
The fund-raising move aligns with Torrent's acquisition strategy, reported by Reuters citing bankers.
